new_classes.label_en: Rum and Sugar-Cane Spirit in Containers of More Than 2 Litres (CN 22084091)
new_classes.label_de: Rum und andere Branntweine aus vergärten Zuckerrohrerzeugnissen in Behältnissen mit mehr als 2 Litern (KN 22084091)
new_classes.definition_en: Rum and other spirits obtained by distilling fermented sugar-cane products (including rum and taffia as described in the HS explanatory notes to heading 2208, third paragraph, point 3), retaining their typical organoleptic characteristics, presented in containers of more than 2 litres; classified under CN code 22084091.

coverage_explanation: The key distinguishing criteria from the legal text are: (1) the product is rum or other spirit obtained by distilling fermented sugar-cane products (covered via hasSugarCaneDistillationProcess and parent class RumAndSugarCaneSpirit); (2) the product retains its typical organoleptic/sensory characteristics as required by the HS notes (covered via retainsOrganolepticalCharacteristics); (3) the container volume is more than 2 litres (covered via decimalRange minExclusive 2 on maxContainerVolumeL). The disjointness with RumSmallContainer (≤ 2 L, CN 22084051) is expressed via a complement restriction. Minor gap: the specific mention of 'taffia' as a subtype of sugar-cane spirit is not separately modelled as a subclass, and the exact alcohol strength range for this subheading range (22084011–22084099) is not formally captured as a numeric restriction; coverage is therefore set to 0.85.
